TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ben_Bentil, title = Ben_Bentil, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ben_Bentil} }

S.FORM: == Ben Bentil == Ben Bentil hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1995, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Ben Bentil, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na sraral mopu magal kawas nya mruw qutux ngasal nha aring Ghana musa maki United States. Bentil semong unro magan blaq na wagiq pila beh Haverford School. hiya ga Saint Andrews squilq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing(2018-19) plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 12.5 teng. min 6.7 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 0.9 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. ru min 0.8 zmingat mari' na sinngusan naha'. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Ben Bentil

== Ben Bentil == Ben Bentil hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1995, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Ben Bentil, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na sraral mopu magal kawas nya mruw qutux ngasal nha aring Ghana musa maki United States. Bentil semong unro magan blaq na wagiq pila beh Haverford School. hiya ga Saint Andrews squilq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing(2018-19) plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 12.5 teng. min 6.7 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 0.9 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. ru min 0.8 zmingat mari' na sinngusan naha'. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Ben Bentil
S.PHON: == βen βentil == βen βentil ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen βentil, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na s~ɕraral mopu maɣal kawas~ɕ nja mruw qutux ŋas~ɕal nħa ariŋ ɣħana mus~ɕa maki unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ. βentil s~ɕemoŋ unro maɣan βlaq na waɣiq pila βeħ ħa*er*or* s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. ħija ɣa s~ɕaint an*rews~ɕ s~ɕquilq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ(****-**) plpɣun iŋalan njaʔ tins~ɕuʔ minxal ɣa **.* teŋ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ. min *.* qu rnaw njaʔ maɣal tens~ɕuʔ. ru min *.* zmiŋat mariʔ na s~ɕinŋus~ɕan naħaʔ. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βen βentil
